greeting: What do you want to produce today?
subtitle: Desktop workspace for focused office tasks and deliverables
inputHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline. Verify important outputs before sharing.
safeModeEnabled: Read-only — AI can only analyze, no file changes
modeDesc_plan: AI will explore and analyze, no file changes
modeDesc_ask: AI will ask before making each change
contextCompressed: Context was compressed to fit limits
agentQuestion: The agent has a question for you:
suggestSummarize: Summarize key numbers and trends in a table
suggestExtract: Extract decisions, risks, and next actions
suggestConvert: Convert slides into an executive brief
suggestCompare: Compare all files and produce one consolidated output
capDocumentDraftingDesc: Create emails, reports, summaries, and briefs
capSpreadsheetAnalysisDesc: Summarize data and extract business insights
capInformationRetrievalDesc: Find facts across files and conversations
capWebResearchDesc: Gather recent references from the web
capFileOrganizationDesc: Sort, rename, and organize local files automatically
capDataExtractionDesc: Pull tables and key data from PDFs and documents
capBatchProcessingDesc: Process multiple files in one go with consistent rules
capEmailComposeDesc: Draft professional emails from context and notes
starterOrganizeBillsPrompt: Scan my Downloads folder, find all invoices and receipts, then organize them by month into a summary spreadsheet.
starterSummarizeFolderPrompt: Read all documents in my current workspace folder and produce a concise summary of each file with key takeaways.
starterCleanupFilesPrompt: Analyze my workspace folder, identify duplicate or outdated files, and suggest which ones to archive or delete.
starterDraftFromNotesPrompt: Find my recent meeting notes and draft a professional follow-up email with action items and deadlines.
starterRenamePhotosPrompt: Batch rename all photos in my workspace folder using the date taken and a short description from each image.
starterCompareDocsPrompt: Compare the two most recent document versions in my workspace and highlight the key differences in a summary.
starterExtractPdfTablesPrompt: Find all PDF files in my workspace, extract any tables from them, and consolidate into a single spreadsheet.
starterWeeklyDigestPrompt: Scan my workspace for documents modified this week and compile a digest with the title and one-line summary of each.
planSelectText: Select text in the preview to add comments
planFeedbackPlaceholder: Tell Claude what to do instead
